message:
fix(mux): add RAII MuxSubscriptionGuard to prevent subscription leaks

Add MuxSubscriptionGuard that calls mux.unsubscribe(sub_id) on drop,
preventing mux subscription leaks when client connections close. Nest
the main event loop inside the guard's scope to guarantee cleanup on
any exit path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
